info.title: API
info.description:
RESTful api
API is incomplete and may have changes

local_domain.description: Local domain for the VMs and Objectspaces within the cloudspace

vcpu_quota.description: VCPU Quota. If omitted the account will be able to provision an unlimited amount of VCPUs.

vdisk_space_quota.description: VDisk Quota, If omitted the account will be able to provision an unlimited amount of VDisks.

memory_quota.description: Memory Quota, If omitted the account will be able to provision an unlimited amount of Memory.

public_ip_quota.description: Public IP Quota, If omitted the account will be able to provision an unlimited amount of Public IPs.

firewall.description: Only one of parent_cloudspace_id or external_network_id should be passed

external_network_id.description: Cloudspace Parent external network ID. Otherwise if empty default network will be used

parent_cloudspace_id.description: Parent Cloudspace ID, used for nested cloudspace, needs to be in the same location

custom.description:
Custom firewall specs, if not passed default virtual gateway will be used with external_network_id
Only one cdrom_id or image_id should be passed

resource_id.description:
Id of the resource.
Not relevant for a customer role.
For a location the location code needs to be used.
For a virtual machine the id is formed by concatenating the vm cloudspace_id with the vm id separated
by a colon (eg kjgkhjgkjhgk:45646 )
